semantic.role: Vitest integration test suite for experimental view layer configuration resolution.
responsibilities: Validates the resolveExperimentalViewLayer function's behavior under different configuration scenarios.
Tests environment variable SPINE_EXPERIMENTAL_VIEW_LAYER override mechanics.
Verifies Config.setExperimentalViewLayer persistence and its effect on resolution.
Ensures temporary test directories are created and cleaned up properly.
outOfScope: Unit testing of individual view layer components in isolation.
Testing of view derivation or post-commit derivation logic.
Performance or stress testing of the view layer resolution.
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (Rule: test-file-suffix).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish integration tests for the experimental view layer resolution mechanism, ensuring configuration overrides and persistence work correctly.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: refactor(arch): establish subsystem facades and resolve layer inversions

English.role: Vitest integration test suite for experimental view layer configuration resolution.
responsibilities: Validates the resolveExperimentalViewLayer function's behavior under different configuration scenarios.
Tests environment variable SPINE_EXPERIMENTAL_VIEW_LAYER override mechanics.
Verifies Config.setExperimentalViewLayer persistence and its effect on resolution.
Ensures temporary test directories are created and cleaned up properly.
outOfScope: Unit testing of individual view layer components in isolation.
Testing of view derivation or post-commit derivation logic.
Performance or stress testing of the view layer resolution.

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于实验性视图层配置解析的 Vitest 集成测试套件。
responsibilities: 验证 resolveExperimentalViewLayer 函数在不同配置场景下的行为。
测试环境变量 SPINE_EXPERIMENTAL_VIEW_LAYER 的覆盖机制。
验证 Config.setExperimentalViewLayer 的持久性及其对解析结果的影响。
确保临时测试目录被正确创建和清理。
outOfScope: 对单个视图层组件的单元测试。
视图派生或提交后派生逻辑的测试。
视图层解析的性能或压力测试。
